lexical_matching: Sucrose is a type of sugar that is commonly found in many foods and beverages. It is a disaccharide composed of glucose and fructose molecules. Sucrose is a source of energy and sweetness in the diet, but consuming too much can contribute to health issues such as obesity and tooth decay. It is important to monitor and limit intake of sucrose as part of a balanced diet.
